title: Confirm dialog component with optional reason input
purpose: Provides a reusable modal dialog for user confirmations that can optionally collect a reason for the action.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named ConfirmDialog that accepts various props for customization and handles keyboard and click events for accessibility and user interaction.

steps.content: Initialize refs for the dialog and confirm button elements.
Set focus to the confirm button when the dialog opens.
Add keyboard event listener to handle escape key press for closing the dialog.
Remove keyboard event listener when the component unmounts.
Render the dialog backdrop and container with appropriate styling.
Display the dialog title and message in the header section.
IF the reason input is enabled, render a textarea for entering a reason.
Render cancel and confirm buttons with appropriate styling and event handlers.
Check if the click target is the backdrop element itself.
IF the click is on the backdrop, call the cancel handler to close the dialog.
